# Transcrição: 16-Nate Tutas

- **Fonte:** 16-Nate Tutas
- **Duração:** 01:21

## [00:00 - 01:21]

Hey, I'm Nate Tudus and I'm the founder of Mindvalt LLC, Unlock Your Mind and Unlock Your Business. Three businesses that would not exist if it wasn't for one simple thing. And that simple thing was a referral. That referral came from the most unlikely of places. It was actually, it came from my mother-in-law when she called my wife late one night and said there's this guy on TV and he's talking about this book, Millionaire Success Happens. And Nate has to know who this guy is. That started a journey where my wife and I have gone from KBB, the original Knowledge Business Blueprint, all the way through to where I'm at today as one of the business consultants that's part of MBA. One of the things I want to share with you is not only how referrals can help grow your business, but how you never know how that one contact can give you an opportunity that if you harness it, if you take the action, if you dive in, if you as Dean likes to say you persist until you succeed, you'll be able to make it. And if you persist until you succeed, if you go through this course, if you take the action and you put in the time, you put in the work, you will be successful. And I look forward to seeing your success.
